parameters.name: invert
parameters.label: Invert Distortion
parameters.description: Reverse the lens distortion. This will *mostly* undo the distortion applied by another Lens Distort with the same parameters and Inverse disabled.     The lens distortion algorithm does not have a pre

parameters.name: k1
parameters.label: K1
parameters.description: The first radial distortion constant. The k constants move pixels towards or away from the center of the image. Values greater than 0 produce a barrel or fisheye effect, while values less than zero pr

parameters.name: k2
parameters.label: K2
parameters.description: The second radial distortion constant. See K1.

parameters.name: p1
parameters.label: P1
parameters.description: The first tangential distortion constant. Tilts the image up and down.

parameters.name: p2
parameters.label: P2
parameters.description: The second tangential distortion constant. Tilts the image left or right.

parameters.name: k3
parameters.label: K3
parameters.description: The third radial distortion constant (not used in the inverse distortion). See K1.

parameters.name: layout
parameters.label: Layout
parameters.description: Determines how the transformed image is arranged inside the final output image space. This value can be useful to preserve the native pixel resolution of the input image, or ensuring a final output re

parameters.name: extendmode
parameters.label: Extend Mode
parameters.description: Determines what values are used when the output image exceeds the bounds of the input image.

parameters.name: alpha
parameters.label: Optimal Alpha
parameters.description: Determines how much of the image is preserved when calculating the optimal post transform. When zero, the optimal transform will include only the region of interest. When one, the transform will inclu

parameters.name: transformmode
parameters.label: Post Transform
parameters.description: Choose whether to preform an addition transformation to the image after the lens distortion is applied. This is useful for positioning and scaling the distorted image within the final image frame and

parameters.name: newcenterunit
parameters.label: New Center Unit
parameters.description: Determines how the new center values are interpreted.

parameters.name: cropmode
parameters.label: Cropping
parameters.description: Crop the transformed image so that only part of the image will appear in the final output. Unless a custom resolution is given, the cropped region will be used to determine the final output resolution

parameters.name: cropunit
parameters.label: Crop Unit
parameters.description: The units used to interpret the values of the custom cropping region. Can be as fractions (0-1) of the image or as pixels of the input image size.

parameters.name: scale2
parameters.label: Scale2
parameters.description: Performs an additional post-distortion scale on the image. The scale is relative to the original camera matrix, so values greater than 1 will stretch the image, while values less than 1 will shrink it

parameters.name: focallength2
parameters.label: Focallength2
parameters.description: The focal length components of the camera matrix descibed either as normalized resolution-independent values or as pixels. The focal length acts as a scalar on the other distortion parameters. The nor

parameters.name: newcenter2
parameters.label: Newcenter2
parameters.description: A new optical center position that allows for shifting the transformed image within the output image frame. Using the same value as the Optical Center parameter will result in no post distortion offse

parameters.name: newfocallength2
parameters.label: Newfocallength2
parameters.description: A new focal length that allows for scaling the transformed image relative to output image frame. Using the same value as the Focal Lengths parameter will result in no post distortion scaling. Using th

parameters.name: center2
parameters.label: Center2
parameters.description: The position in the image that should be the center of the distortion. Depending on the unit mode selected, the position can be entered as an absolute position measured from the bottom-left corner, or

parameters.name: cropregionw
parameters.label: Cropregionw
parameters.description: Defines a custom cropping region in the order of Left, Bottom, Right, Top. The values can either be as a fraction of the image (0-1) or as pixels of the input image size. Entering the ROI values from

parameters.name: centeroffset2
parameters.label: Centeroffset2
parameters.description: Shifts the distorted image within the output image frame.
